scripts.build: NODE_ENV=production tsup ./src/index.ts --format esm --out-dir ./dist --platform browser --external react --external react-dom --external @base-ui/react --external @hugeicons/core-free-icons --external @hugeicons/react --external @q9labs/chalk-ui --external @q9labs/chalk-ui/reactions --external @q9labs/chalk-whiteboard --external @excalidraw/excalidraw --external @tanstack/react-hotkeys --external class-variance-authority --external clsx --external facehash --external react-markdown --external react-resizable-panels --external sonner --external tailwind-merge --external web-haptics && pnpm run build:fix-use-client && pnpm run build:types
scripts.dev: tsup ./src/index.ts --format esm --out-dir ./dist --platform browser --external react --external react-dom --external @base-ui/react --external @hugeicons/core-free-icons --external @hugeicons/react --external @q9labs/chalk-ui --external @q9labs/chalk-ui/reactions --external @q9labs/chalk-whiteboard --external @excalidraw/excalidraw --external @tanstack/react-hotkeys --external class-variance-authority --external clsx --external facehash --external react-markdown --external react-resizable-panels --external sonner --external tailwind-merge --external web-haptics --watch
